name: worktree-reset
description: Skill (/m) that tears down agent state (tasks, timers, teammates, subagents, monitors, loops, PR subscriptions) — including an OS-level sweep of orphaned monitor/background-job processes — aborts in-progress git operations, resets the current worktree to a base ref (default origin/main), cleans stale branches, and reinstalls dependencies. Supports --force and --base <ref>.
